SELECT dim_geography_hierarchy.location_name
FROM dim_geography_hierarchy
JOIN fact_housing ON dim_geography_hierarchy.hierarchy_id = fact_housing.hierarchy_id

WHERE fact_housing.number_of_households > 5000
AND fact_workers_tertiary_sector.male_workers_trade_commerce > 1000

question: 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' state ke liye, har district aur trade and commerce mein female workers ki total sankhya list karo. Sirf un districts ko include karo jinki sum zero se zyada ho, aur results ko highest se lowest total ke order mein arrange karo.
gold_sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT, SUM(T2.FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY AS T1 JOIN FACT_WORKERS_TERTIARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T2.HIERARCHY_ID JOIN FACT_POPULATION_CORE AS T3 ON T1.HIERARCHY_ID = T3.HIERARCHY_ID WHERE T1.STATE = 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands' GROUP BY T1.DISTRICT HAVING SUM(T2.FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) > 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T2.FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) DESC
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    dgh.DISTRICT,
    SUM(fwt.FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) AS total_female_trade_commerce_workers
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY dgh
JOIN FACT_WORKERS_TERTIARY_SECTOR fwt ON dgh.HIERARCHY_ID = fwt.HIERARCHY_ID
WHERE dgh.STATE ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fwt.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
GROUP BY dgh.DISTRICT
HAVING SUM(fwt.FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) > 0
ORDER BY total_female_trade_commerce_workers DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    dgh.DISTRICT,
    SUM(fwt.FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) AS total_female_trade_commerce_workers
FROM DIM_GEOGRAPHY_HIERARCHY dgh
JOIN FACT_WORKERS_TERTIARY_SECTOR fwt ON dgh.HIERARCHY_ID = fwt.HIERARCHY_ID
WHERE dgh.STATE ILIKE 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands'
    AND fwt.CENSUS_YEAR = 1991
GROUP BY dgh.DISTRICT
HAVING SUM(fwt.FEMALE_WORKERS_TRADE_COMMERCE) > 0
ORDER BY total_female_trade_commerce_workers DESC;
